channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Nothing confirms layoffs, but calls market exit rumors ‘fake news’
item.description: In response to a report that Nothing is planning to "exit 12 markets as global shipments decline," Nothing cofounder Akis Evangelidis said the company is "reorganizing" and laying off some of its staff, but that "the reported numbers are way overblown." Evangelidis disputed a claim about underwhelming sales for Nothing's Phone 4B, saying it "sold […]...

item.title: Why Cognition bought Poke: AI personality is becoming a competitive advantage
item.description: AI coding startup Cognition has acquired Poke, the AI assistant you text like a friend, in a deal valuing the startup in the low nine figures. The acquisition brings Poke’s conversational style and interaction model to Cognition’s coding agent Devin, reflecting a growing belief that how AI assistants interact with users is as important as the models powering them....

item.title: Roku raises streaming hardware prices by up to $50
item.description: Roku has increased prices across its streaming hardware, with the cheapest HD Streaming Stick now priced at $39.99 instead of $29.99, as first reported by The Desk. The price hike affects all of Roku's other devices as well, with some increasing by as much as $50. Here's a rundown of the changes: Roku is currently […]

item.title: Bizarre ou logique ? À l’horizontale, le Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 prend des photos verticales quand il est déplié
item.description: Une fois déplié, le Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 peut dérouter au moment de prendre une photo ou une vidéo, à cause de l'orientation de son écran. Explications.

item.title: Boox teases the incredibly tiny Picco ereader
item.description: It features a 3.97-inch monochrome e-paper display.

item.title: US accuses American of allegedly wiping his phone using a ‘duress’ password during border search
item.description: A U.S. citizen has asked a court to throw out the government's claim that he gave over a passcode to border authorities that wiped his phone's data, opening up fresh questions about a person's constitutional rights at the U.S. border.

item.title: Did Chinese AI Steal From Anthropic, and OpenAI Loses Control of Two Models
item.description: On this episode of Uncanny Valley, we dive into accusations that China’s Moonshot AI stole from Anthropic, and how the US Army needs to cut back on AI use.

item.title: Blade Runner 2099’s moody dystopia streams on Amazon in November
item.description: After teasing the series with some first-look images yesterday, Amazon is finally properly unveiling its Blade Runner streaming series. Called Blade Runner 2099, the show hits Prime Video on November 25th with all eight episodes dropping at once. We also got the first trailer for the series, which is full of Blade Runner staples: a […]

item.title: Anduril reportedly in talks to raise funding at $100B valuation, more than 3x last year’s mark
item.description: Anduril is said to be raising a new round of funding that may push its valuation up to about $100 billion, per Reuters.

item.title: J’ai testé le TV Hisense UR9S : compatible Dolby Vision 2 et la meilleure colorimétrie jamais mesurée sur un Hisense
item.description: En 2026, Hisense fait grimper d'un cran son offre RGB Mini LED avec la série UR9S, positionnée au-dessus de la série UR8S comme le porte-étendard de la marque pour l'image et le son haut de gamme. Reste à savoir si son prix supérieur se traduit par un supplément de qualité réellement mesurable face à une concurrence elle aussi très active sur ce terrain. ...

item.title: You can’t ignore Google Zero anymore
item.description: The web and Google once had a deal: Google collects data and indexes webpages and in exchange sends oceans of traffic to websites. The deal wasn't perfect and certainly made Google more money than it made the websites, but it worked for a long time. Now, however, the deal seems to be dead. And the […]

item.title: PlayStation Network is experiencing a massive outage
item.description: Players may be unable to log into their account, play online or purchase games from the PlayStation Store.

item.title: J’ai roulé 1000 km en Polestar 2 : pourquoi je la préfère à la Tesla Model 3
item.description: Polestar, la marque cousine de Volvo, arrive enfin en France. L’occasion pour moi de prendre le volant de l’un de ses premiers modèles, mais aussi du plus accessible d’entre eux : la Polestar 2. Cette berline électrique vaut-elle encore le coup face à la Tesla Model 3 ? J’ai parcouru 1 000 km pour répondre à cette question.

item.title: Anthropic releases Opus 5 with ‘close’ to Fable 5’s capabilities
item.description: Weeks after Anthropic's latest toe-to-toe with the US government, and days after an OpenAI security incident that dominated tech industry discussions, Anthropic on Thursday released its newest model, Claude Opus 5. The company said in a release that Opus 5 "comes close to the capabilities of Claude Fable 5 in many domains" and is much […]

item.title: Meta is making its AI chatbot more like an assistant
item.description: Meta is upgrading its AI chatbot with new productivity features in a bid to compete with rivals like Gemini, ChatGPT, and Claude. The update will allow Meta AI to tap into your calendar to help you plan events and generate daily briefings, as well as perform in-depth research that you can steer as it progresses. […]

item.title: Build in public, fail in public: what it’s like to be a founder under 20 right now
item.description: AI tools have democratized the opportunity to build, shortening the timelines of success and enabling more young people to start successful companies without stepping foot inside a Big Tech company.

item.title: Anthropic launches Opus 5
item.description: Opus 5 will be both cheaper and less restrictive than Fable, likely making it preferable in most use cases.

item.title: Shokz' new OpenDots Air aren't flashy, but after a month of testing I can confidently say they're the best clip-style open earbuds for most people
item.description: The Shokz OpenDots Air miss some flashy features of their flagship siblings, but the low price and reliability makes them a solid buy

item.title: Anthropic says Opus 5 can nearly match its top-performing model for half the price
item.description: Anthropic's latest model offers top-tier performance at a much cheaper cost.

item.title: Anthropic launches Claude Opus 5, a cheaper AI model for coding, agents and enterprise workflows
item.description: Anthropic released Claude Opus 5 on Friday, a model the company says delivers nearly all the intelligence of its top-of-the-line Claude Fable 5 at half the cost — a launch that signals how the AI race is shifting from raw capability to the economics of daily use.The model, available immediately on all of Anthropic's platforms, is priced at $5 per million input tokens and $25 per million output tokens, unchanged from its predecessor, Opus 4.8. It becomes the new default model on Claude Max, Anthropic's premium consumer tier, and the strongest model available on Claude Pro.The positioning is del...

item.title: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 5 for both AI coding and general office work
item.description: Anthropic says the model can make its way through the steps of a complicated problem without much back-and-forth with the user. Today Anthropic released its new Opus 5 model, which the company claims delivers performance comparable to its more advanced Fable 5 model at half the price.

item.title: India’s move against Jack Dorsey’s Bitchat sparks legal debate
item.description: The offline messaging app surged in popularity in India amid protests in New Delhi.

item.title: Avatar: Seven Havens finally has a trailer and a release date of October 9
item.description: The post-apocalyptic tale takes place after the events of The Legend of Korra.

item.title: OpenAI’s own model went rogue before Kimi had Wall Street sweating
item.description: Chinese AI lab Moonshot’s open model Kimi went viral this week for reasons that had less to do with the model itself and more to do with how the U.S. AI industry reacted to it. Meanwhile, an unreleased OpenAI model wandered outside its test environment and ended up connected to a real security breach at Hugging Face — a reminder […]

item.title: Trump angers trade partners with new hikes on tariffs linked to claims of forced labor
item.description: The Trump administration announced extra tariffs of 10% to 12.5% on 60 economies. U.S. President Donald Trump’s latest set of tariff hikes drew objections Friday from America’s trading partners including China and Japan, with Australia’s trade minister slamming them as “completely unjustified.”The administration announced extra tariffs of 10% to 12.5% on 60 economies late Thursday, saying the countries had failed to adequately enforce a ban on goods made with forced labor.The new tariffs took effect just as stopgap levies Trump imposed after a stinging defeat at the Supreme Court expired at 12...

item.title: Your phone may not be as waterproof as you think — here's why IP68 can be misleading
item.description: Don't just jump straight into a pool with your phone, you savage.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 VS Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra : quelles différences ? Notre comparatif
item.description: Quelle différence peut-on observer entre les deux nouveaux modèles Samsung, le Galaxy Z Fold 8 et le Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra ? Réponse dans ce comparatif complet.
